prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis on ferrocene was performed using the chemkit tool with the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. The calculated Fukui index (fukui_zero) at the most electrophilic site is approximately 0.01291. The method used is GFN2-xTB. No warnings or issues were reported during the calculation. The result is provided as-is from the computational analysis.
